metadata.significance: Last complete surah revealed, about conquest of Mecca and people entering Islam

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ

translations.en_sahih: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
translations.en_yusufali: When comes the Help of Allah, and Victory,
translations.ms_basmeih: Apabila datang pertolongan Allah dan kemenangan (semasa engkau wahai Muhammad berjaya menguasai negeri Makkah), -

ayahs.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waraayta alnnasa yadkhuloona fee deeni Allahi afwajan

translations.en_sahih: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,
translations.en_yusufali: And thou dost see the people enter Allah's Religion in crowds,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan engkau melihat manusia masuk dalam ugama Allah beramai-ramai, -

ayahs.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika waistaghfirhu innahu kana tawwaban

translations.en_sahih: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.
translations.en_yusufali: Celebrate the praises of thy Lord, and pray for His Forgiveness: For He is Oft-Returning (in Grace and Mercy).
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ucapkanlah tasbih dengan memuji Tuhanmu dan mintalah ampun kepadaNya, sesungguhnya Dia amat menerima taubat.
